profile_backing.full_profile_command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

focused_baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64 --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2
focused_baseline.note: Retained as prior focused baseline, but same-worker profile-vs-candidate data is the rejection basis.

candidate.description: For m>=4 and n>=4, accumulated a 4x4 output tile in scalar locals across the full ascending-k loop, reusing each loaded B 4-column panel across four rows and storing each output cell once; scalar tails handled partial rows and columns.

proof_test.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax matmul_2d -- --nocapture
proof_test.details: 3 tests passed in candidate state, including adversarial signed-zero, infinity, and NaN-payload bit-pattern coverage.

rebench.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64 --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate preserved row-major output and each output cell accumulated l=0..k-1 in ascending order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A: GEMM has no comparison or tie-breaking behavior.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate used the same scalar multiplication and addition sequence per output cell; no FMA, reassociation, partial-sum merge, SIMD reduction, or mixed precision was introduced.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: matmul_2d consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No public error path changed in candidate state; slice indexing stayed in matmul_2d.

alien_source.primitive_family: cache-aware dense linear algebra with tiled kernels and communication-avoiding follow-up decompositions
alien_source.applied_slice: Tried a register-local 4x4 tile after prior one-row col8 accumulator regressed; this did not improve the measured matmul hotspot.

next_primitive.target: packed-B-panel GEMM or recursive/cache-oblivious GEMM preserving per-cell ascending-k accumulation
next_primitive.reason: Both one-row col8 and 4x4 local-accumulator schedules increased instruction/register pressure without improving the measured hotspot. The next pass should change memory layout/reuse by packing B panels or recursively traversing cache-sized blocks while keeping each output cell's scalar contribution order unchanged.
proof_obligations: each output cell receives contributions in the original l=0..k-1 order
no FMA, reassociation, mixed precision, RNG, tie-breaking, or public error change
next_primitive.fallback_trigger: Reject and restore source if same-worker RCH Criterion mean does not beat the retained baseline with Score>=2.0.
